executive_summary.summary: The website https://plausible.io/ has been audited, revealing areas of strength and weakness across various dimensions.

top_issues.title: Implement Missing Security Headers
top_issues.description: Implement the missing security headers to improve the site's security posture.
top_issues.recommendation: Implement the missing security headers, such as strict-transport-security, content-security-policy, x-frame-options, x-content-type-options, and referrer-policy.
top_issues.evidence: Implement the missing security headers to improve the site's security posture.
top_issues.impact: Implement the missing security headers to improve the site's security posture.

top_issues.impact: Continuously monitor the site's security posture to protect against emerging threats.

performance.summary: The page scores 100/100 on performance, with all metrics meeting the recommended thresholds.

findings.evidence: LCP: 1.3 s mobile / 0.4 s desktop; budget 2.5 s. INP: not reported. CLS: 0 mobile / 0 desktop; budget 0.1.
findings.impact: The page meets all Core Web Vitals thresholds.
The page does not have any render-blocking resources.

findings.evidence: Estimated savings of 14 KiB from using efficient cache lifetimes.
findings.impact: Using efficient cache lifetimes can improve page load times.
findings.recommendation: Consider implementing efficient cache lifetimes to improve page load times.

findings.impact: The page has a moderate DOM size.
findings.recommendation: Consider optimizing the DOM size to improve page responsiveness.

accessibility.summary: Automated tooling detects roughly a third of WCAG failures; manual review is required for the categories listed in `manual_review_required`. The page has an accessibility score of 64, indicating some barriers to accessibility.

findings.evidence: The page has some inaccessible elements, including missing accessible names for some interactive elements.
findings.impact: Screen reader users may have difficulty navigating the page due to missing accessible names.
findings.recommendation: Add accessible names to all interactive elements, such as buttons and links.

findings.evidence: The page has some elements with ARIA attributes that do not match their roles.
findings.impact: Users of assistive technologies may experience inconsistent behavior due to mismatched ARIA attributes.
findings.recommendation: Ensure that all ARIA attributes match their corresponding roles.

seo.summary: The page has a good SEO score, but there are some areas for improvement. The page is crawlable, has a valid title and meta description, and uses canonical links. However, there are some issues with image alt text.

findings.impact: Search engines may have difficulty understanding the content of images on the page.
findings.recommendation: Add descriptive alt text to all images on the page.

security.summary: Plausible.io has a good security posture but lacks essential security headers and has some areas for improvement.

findings.impact: The site uses a modern TLS protocol and cipher, but it's recommended to monitor for any potential issues.
findings.recommendation: Continue to use modern TLS protocols and ciphers, and monitor for any potential issues.

findings.evidence: Missing security headers: strict-transport-security, content-security-policy, x-frame-options, x-content-type-options, referrer-policy
findings.impact: The lack of essential security headers increases the risk of various attacks, such as XSS and clickjacking.
findings.recommendation: Implement the missing security headers, such as strict-transport-security, content-security-policy, x-frame-options, x-content-type-options, and referrer-policy, to improve the site's security posture.

findings.impact: The site has a permissions-policy header, which is a good practice, but it's not enough to fully protect against security threats.
findings.recommendation: Continue to use the permissions-policy header and consider implementing other security headers to further improve the site's security posture.

findings.evidence: Sitemap.xml contains URLs that may be sensitive: https://plausible.io/ad-cost-calculator, https://plausible.io/google-analytics-script-size, etc.
findings.impact: The sitemap.xml file may be exposing sensitive information about the site's structure and content.
findings.recommendation: Review the sitemap.xml file and remove any sensitive URLs to prevent potential information disclosure.

best-practices.summary: The site follows best practices for security, performance, and user experience.

findings.impact: The site is protected against eavesdropping and tampering attacks.
findings.recommendation: Continue to use HTTPS to protect user data.

findings.evidence: The site does not request geolocation permission on page load.
findings.impact: Users are not prompted for geolocation permission without context.
findings.recommendation: Continue to avoid requesting geolocation permission on page load.

findings.evidence: The site does not request notification permission on page load.
findings.impact: Users are not prompted for notification permission without context.
findings.recommendation: Continue to avoid requesting notification permission on page load.

findings.evidence: The site allows users to paste into input fields.
findings.impact: Users can easily enter data into input fields.
findings.recommendation: Continue to allow users to paste into input fields.
